languages.original_text: "Such methods of minimising entropy are one of the few things that disturb the galvanic circuits in my brain. That you would sanction them, colleague, truly surprises me."

languages.text: "Подобные методы уменьшения энтропии являются одной из немногих вещей, тревожащих гальванические цепи в моем мозгу. То, что вы их санкционируете, коллега, меня искренне удивляет".
"Such methods of minimising entropy are one of the few things that disturb the galvanic circuits in my brain. That you would sanction them, colleague, truly surprises me."
languages.original_text: "Подобные методы уменьшения энтропии являются одной из немногих вещей, тревожащих гальванические цепи в моем мозгу. То, что вы их санкционируете, коллега, меня искренне удивляет".

traits.locale_text: "Such methods of minimising entropy are one of the few things that disturb the galvanic circuits in my brain. That you would sanction them, colleague, truly surprises me."
"Such methods of minimising entropy are one of the few things that disturb the galvanic circuits in my brain. That you would sanction them, colleague, truly surprises me."
"Such methods of minimising entropy are one of the few things that disturb the galvanic circuits in my brain. That you would sanction them, colleague, truly surprises me."

languages.text: «Esos métodos de minimizar la entropía son una de las pocas cosas que interfieren con los circuitos galvánicos de mi cerebro. Me sorprende realmente que los autorice, colega».
languages.original_text: "Such methods of minimising entropy are one of the few things that disturb the galvanic circuits in my brain. That you would sanction them, colleague, truly surprises me."

traits.locale_text: «Esos métodos de minimizar la entropía son una de las pocas cosas que interfieren con los circuitos galvánicos de mi cerebro. Me sorprende realmente que los autorice, colega».

languages.text: 「そのようなエントロピー最小化の手法は、私の脳のガルヴァニック回路を乱す数少ないものの一つです。あなたがそれを是認するとは、同僚、まことに驚きです」
languages.original_text: "Such methods of minimising entropy are one of the few things that disturb the galvanic circuits in my brain. That you would sanction them, colleague, truly surprises me."

traits.locale_text: 「そのようなエントロピー最小化の手法は、私の脳のガルヴァニック回路を乱す数少ないものの一つです。あなたがそれを是認するとは、同僚、まことに驚きです」

languages.text: “这种将熵降至最低的方法，是少数足以扰乱我思维原电回路的事物之一。你竟然会批准这种做法，实在令我意外。”
languages.original_text: "Such methods of minimising entropy are one of the few things that disturb the galvanic circuits in my brain. That you would sanction them, colleague, truly surprises me."

traits.locale_text: “这种将熵降至最低的方法，是少数足以扰乱我思维原电回路的事物之一。你竟然会批准这种做法，实在令我意外。”

languages.text: "Derartige Methoden zur Minimierung der Entropie zählen zu den wenigen Dingen, die die galvanischen Kreise in meinem Gehirn stören. Dass Ihr sie sanktionieren würdet, Kollege, überrascht mich sehr."
languages.original_text: "Such methods of minimising entropy are one of the few things that disturb the galvanic circuits in my brain. That you would sanction them, colleague, truly surprises me."

traits.locale_text: "Derartige Methoden zur Minimierung der Entropie zählen zu den wenigen Dingen, die die galvanischen Kreise in meinem Gehirn stören. Dass Ihr sie sanktionieren würdet, Kollege, überrascht mich sehr."

languages.text: « De telles méthodes pour minimiser l'entropie, voilà bien l'une des rares choses qui perturbent les circuits galvaniques dans mon cerveau. Je suis très surpris que vous les cautionniez, honorable collègue. »
languages.original_text: "Such methods of minimising entropy are one of the few things that disturb the galvanic circuits in my brain. That you would sanction them, colleague, truly surprises me."

traits.locale_text: « De telles méthodes pour minimiser l'entropie, voilà bien l'une des rares choses qui perturbent les circuits galvaniques dans mon cerveau. Je suis très surpris que vous les cautionniez, honorable collègue. »

languages.text: "Entropiyi en aza indirmeye yönelik bu tür yöntemler, beynimdeki galvaniz devreleri rahatsız eden nadir şeylerden biri. Onları onaylaman beni gerçekten şaşırtıyor meslektaşım."
languages.original_text: "Such methods of minimising entropy are one of the few things that disturb the galvanic circuits in my brain. That you would sanction them, colleague, truly surprises me."

traits.locale_text: "Entropiyi en aza indirmeye yönelik bu tür yöntemler, beynimdeki galvaniz devreleri rahatsız eden nadir şeylerden biri. Onları onaylaman beni gerçekten şaşırtıyor meslektaşım."
